title: Seden
description: Technology, magic and exploration. An attempt at putting a little bit of everything together and see what comes of it.
body:
Magic mods: Ars nouveau, Iron's Spells
Tech: Create + Addons
Biome and Dimension mods: Biomes'o'Plenty, Unexplored Regions and others
YUNG's mods
Farmer's Delight + Addons
Expanded Combat + Addons
Ice and Fire
ParCool and Better Combat


There are creatures of the dark. Beware.


Have fun with a variety of mods that might not make sense together. Choose your own way of playing and enjoying the game, play with friends using Essential mod.
